name: shield-scanner-mcp
description: プロンプトインジェクション検知MCP — AIに渡す前のテキスト・ファイル・URL・メールを事前スキャン

tools.name: scan_text
tools.description: Scan raw text for prompt injection threats (invisible unicode, control chars, suspicious patterns, homoglyphs)

tools.name: scan_file
tools.description: Scan a file (txt/md/csv/json/html/xml/svg/docx/pdf/pptx/eml) for hidden threats

tools.name: scan_url
tools.description: Fetch a URL and scan its raw HTML for hidden threats before AI reads it

tools.name: scan_email
tools.description: Scan an .eml file or raw email text, checking headers/body/HTML parts separately

tools.name: sanitize_text
tools.description: Return a cleaned version of text with detected threats removed

tools.name: sanitize_file
tools.description: Create a sanitized copy of a file with detected threats removed
